WITH
SET [~COLUMNS] AS
    Hierarchize({{[D54N].[D54NH].[ateIdLev2].Members}, {[D54N].[D54NH].[ateIdLev3].Members}})
SET [~ROWS_D04_D04H] AS
    {[D04].[D04H].[VozrGr5Id].Members}
SET [~ROWS_D01_PolId] AS
    {[D01].[PolId].[PolId].Members}
SET [~ROWS_D02_NasTipId] AS
    {[D02].[NasTipId].[NasTipId].Members}
SELECT
NON EMPTY CrossJoin([~COLUMNS], {[Measures].[NasKol09], [Measures].[NasKol19]}) ON COLUMNS,
NON EMPTY NonEmptyCrossJoin([~ROWS_D04_D04H], NonEmptyCrossJoin([~ROWS_D01_PolId], [~ROWS_D02_NasTipId])) ON ROWS
FROM [F201N]
